Potential repricing windows

Macro calendar

High-impact releases and how they alter the regime.

US CPI

Critical

United States | 2026-03-18 | Inflation

Consensus: 2.9% YoY

A downside surprise would reinforce duration support and a broader risk-on stance.

FOMC Rate Decision

Critical

United States | 2026-03-20 | Central Bank

Consensus: Hold

Forward guidance matters more than the rate decision for growth and tech leadership.

China Credit Impulse

High

China | 2026-03-22 | Liquidity

Consensus: Incremental easing

Supports cyclicals, industrial metals, and emerging market beta if confirmed.

ECB Staff Projections

Moderate

Europe | 2026-03-24 | Growth

Consensus: Soft upgrade

Could improve confidence in European cyclicals but may steepen rates if inflation persists.

Geopolitical board

Severity-scored context for cross-asset positioning.

Regime explanation panel

Trend, breadth, and volatility are supportive, but upcoming macro events and geopolitical overlays argue for selective rather than aggressive risk-taking.

Red Sea shipping disruption watch

High

Active

Keeps freight and energy risk premia elevated; favors resilient quality and shipping beneficiaries.

US-China semiconductor restrictions

Moderate

Escalation risk

Creates headline volatility across chips but supports local supply-chain diversification plays.

OPEC+ compliance drift

Moderate

Monitoring

Affects oil beta and inflation expectations, which feed directly into regime balance.
